faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in College Point?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in College Point typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a flea problem in College Point?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to College Point residents. Once you contact us, we can typically schedule an inspection within 24 hours and begin treatment immediately if needed. Our proximity to College Point allows us to respond quickly to urgent flea situations.

faqs.question: Are your flea treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for both pets and children when applied correctly. We offer eco-friendly and low-toxicity treatment options specifically designed for homes with families and pets. Our technicians will provide detailed instructions on any necessary precautions during and after treatment.

faqs.question: Do I need multiple treatments to eliminate fleas completely?
faqs.answer: Most flea infestations require 2-3 treatments spaced 2-3 weeks apart to effectively eliminate all life stages, including eggs, larvae, and adults. We'll assess your specific situation during the initial inspection and create a customized treatment plan. Follow-up visits are included in our service to ensure complete eradication.
